name: agrocore-monorepo
description: AGROCORE - AI Powered Agricultural Intelligence System (MERN Stack)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install && pip install -r ml/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "python -m ml.app.main"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend build && npm --prefix backend build
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build

author: AgroCore Team
